title: Claude Code vs Codex: Which Should You ACTUALLY Use?
summary: Austin Marchese compares Claude Code and Codex across five categories (UI, technical output, design output, non-technical output, cost and speed) and argues that choosing between them is the wrong question to ask. He recommends focusing energy on a specific underlying factor rather than tool selection.
